expected_rule: Same employee and declaration period appears more than once
Same employee and declaration period appears more than once
NIR fictif is required or must be explicitly justified missing
NIR fictif must contain 13 to 15 digits
Gross salary must be positive for active paid rows
URSSAF base must stay within 5 percent of gross salary in this training dataset
URSSAF rate must be between 0.01 and 0.30
URSSAF amount must equal base_urssaf times taux_urssaf within 0.02
Employee with exit date must not remain active
Exit date must not be before entry date
Retirement contribution amount is required when retirement base is positive
